---
title: "About Me!"
lightbox: 
  match: auto
  effect: zoom
  desc-position: right
  loop: true
format:
  html:
    css: styles.scss
---

# Club Involvement

### SEEDS club

I joined the SEEDS club this quarter and was lucky to join their trip to the Sierra Nevada Aquatic Research Lab . They also recently held a cyanotyping event that was a a lot of fun!

::: {layout-ncol=3}

![UCSB SEEDS](media/SNARL1-square.JPG){group="my-gallery" description="Group photo of UCSB's chapter of SEEDS (Strategies for Ecological Education, Diversity, and Sustainability) club at the Sierra Nevada Aquatic Research Labratory."}

![Convict Lake](media/SNARL2-square.JPG){group="my-gallery" description="On our first day of the trip we visited Convit Lake. We collected plant samples for pressing and documented our findings on the inaturalist app. It went from cool and sunny to snowing sideways."}

![Panorama Dome](media/SNARL3-square.JPG){group="my-gallery" description="On the second day of the trip we went on a hike at Panorama Dome led by a naturalist. We learned about the different types of plant growth caused by differing conditions on the North and South side of the mountains."}
:::

# Hobbies

In my free time, I enjoy cooking, baking, crafting, and painting.


::: {layout-ncol=3}

![Paintings](media/painting81.JPG){group="gallery2" description="Watercolor Birds of Paradise Plant"}

![Crafts](media/craft3.JPG){group="gallery2" description="Crocheted basket"}

![Cooking & Baking](media/food2.JPG){group="gallery2" description="Strawberry Topped Cheesecake"}
:::

# Movie and Music Recommendations

Some of my favorite music artists, shows, and movies that I would recommend!

## My Top Music Artists (This Year)

::: {layout="[1, 1]"}
- Twenty One Pilots
- Pinegrove
- Kevin Abstract
- Klangstof
- Ryan Beatty
- The 1975
- Frank Ocean
- Dodie
- Roy Blair
- Joji

![](media/music-300.jpg)
:::

## My Top Shows and Movies

::: {layout="[1, 1]"}
- Inside Out
- Nightmare Before Christmas
- Knives Out (all three)
- Game Night
- 24
- Bob's Burgers
- American Horror Story
- Black Mirror
- Severance
- Shrinking

![](media/movies-300.jpg)
:::

**Best Rewatches:** Seinfeld, How I Met Your Mother, House, Community, Its Always Sunny in Philadelphia
